name: General Knowledge
description: A collection of facts you’ll only ever use to win an argument at a bar or annoy your family during dinner.

name: Entertainment
description: For people who enjoy the smell of old paper and pretend they’ve actually finished Infinite Jest.

name: Entertainment
description: Prove you’re a cinephile by knowing more about the director's cut than the actual plot of the movie.

name: Entertainment
description: From Mozart to One Direction—test your ability to remember lyrics but forget where you put your keys.

name: Entertainment
description: Jazz hands and dramatic monologues. Finally, a place where breaking into song in public is actually encouraged.

name: Entertainment
description: A tribute to all the hours we’ve spent 'just watching one more episode' instead of being productive members of society.

name: Entertainment
description: Validate the thousands of hours you spent 'testing' virtual physics instead of doing your laundry.

name: Entertainment
description: Friendships were made to be tested. Relive the trauma of losing at Monopoly or being bad at Pictionary.

name: Science
description: Why does the universe exist? We don't know, but we do know how many legs a centipede actually has.

name: Science
description: Turning it off and back on again: The Category. Questions for people who speak in binary and drink too much caffeine.

name: Science
description: The only place where someone buys 60 watermelons and no one asks why. Solve for X, where X is your lost sanity.

name: Humanities
description: Ancient fanfiction about gods who were mostly just really bad at managing their personal lives.

name: Culture
description: People running around in colorful outfits while millions of us yell at our TVs as if they can hear us.

name: World Knowledge
description: Where in the world is... literally anything? Great for people who can find a hidden taco shop but not their own country on a map.

name: Humanities
description: Learning about all the mistakes humanity has made so that we can go ahead and make them all over again.

name: Civics
description: The art of looking for trouble, finding it everywhere, diagnosing it incorrectly, and applying the wrong remedies.

name: Arts
description: Staring at a blank canvas or a banana taped to a wall and calling it 'deep.' Test your knowledge of things you could probably draw.

name: Entertainment
description: Keeping up with people who have more money than us and far more interesting scandals.

name: Science
description: Nature is beautiful, majestic, and occasionally eats its own kind. Learn more about the weirdos of the animal kingdom.

name: Technology
description: From skateboards to spaceships. Basically, a quiz about things that get you from Point A to Point B without walking.

name: Entertainment
description: Men in tights, capes, and the internal logic that allows a billionaire to dress like a bat.

name: Science
description: Stuff you bought on impulse that is currently sitting in a drawer gathering dust. Batteries not included.

name: Entertainment
description: Large eyes, spiky hair, and 20-minute power-ups. Prove your power level is over 9,000.

name: Entertainment
description: Saturday morning nostalgia and the physics of why anvils always fall on coyotes.
